mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TRAINING_CODE2 WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND depth = #{depth} ORDER BY display_seq
SELECT training_code, code_name, depth, display_seq, parent_id, code_type FROM TRAINING_CODE2 WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND depth = #{depth} ORDER BY display_seq

SELECT a.training_code, a.code_name, a.depth, a.display_seq, a.parent_id, a.code_type, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ELIB_BOOK b WHERE b.use_yn != 'N' AND a.code_type = b.code_type AND a.training_code = b.parent_id) AS cnt FROM TRAINING_CODE2 a WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND depth = #{depth} ORDER BY display_seq
SELECT training_code, code_name, depth, display_seq, parent_id, code_type FROM TRAINING_CODE2 WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND training_code = #{training_code}
SELECT training_code, code_name, depth, display_seq, parent_id, code_type FROM TRAINING_CODE2 WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND parent_id = #{training_code}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM TRAINING_CODE2 WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND parent_id = #{training_code}
SELECT NVL(MAX(depth),0)+1 FROM TRAINING_CODE2 WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND training_code = #{parent_id}
SELECT NVL(MAX(display_seq),0)+1 AS display_seq FROM TRAINING_CODE2 WHERE delete_yn = 'N' AND depth = #{depth}
mapper.delete: UPDATE TRAINING_CODE2 SET delete_yn = 'Y' WHERE training_code = #{training_code}
DELETE FROM TRAINING_CODE2 WHERE training_code = #{training_code} OR parent_id = #{parent_id}
